name: Maunawili Demonstration Trail
tagline: A 10-mile one-way traverse through windward paradise — the best single-track on Oahu if you can arrange a car shuttle.
parking: Free parking at the Pali Highway trailhead (Nu'uanu side) or the Waimanalo trailhead on Kumuhau Street
bestTime: Start in the morning going Pali-to-Waimanalo to keep the sun at your back
talkStory: This 10-mile single-track was designed and built in the early 1990s as a 'demonstration trail' — a model for sustainable trail construction in Hawaii using local labor and materials. The route contours along the Ko'olau foothills through land once covered in sugar cane and pineapple plantations, passing remnants of old irrigation infrastructure. Mountain bikers share the trail so stay alert on blind corners — the bikers call it the best single-track on Oahu. Best done as a shuttle hike going Pali-to-Waimanalo to keep the sun at your back.
